findings.text: Risk scores at or above the policy maximum now return "allow", so changes that should be denied by the risk threshold are authorized.
The blocked state check was removed, allowing owner-approved or owner-not-required requests in blocked states to pass instead of being denied.
Admin users are now unconditionally denied after the risk check, reversing the prior behavior where admins could authorize non-blocked, within-risk changes.
summarize_recent now iterates to limit + 1, returning one more result than requested when enough results are available.
The new test only covers the owner-approved happy path and misses the changed risk threshold, admin denial, blocked state, and recent-summary limit behavior.
